infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Clipart AI needs camera access so you can capture a photo to transform.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Clipart AI needs photo library access so you can choose and save images.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Clipart AI needs permission to save generated cliparts to your library.

plugins.photosPermission: Clipart AI accesses your photos so you can import an image.
plugins.cameraPermission: Clipart AI accesses your camera so you can take a photo to transform.

plugins.photosPermission: Clipart AI accesses your photos so you can save generated images.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Clipart AI saves generated images to your photo library.
